strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience with proven expertise in high-performance, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second (Dunnhumby)
Current hands-on work with agentic AI infrastructure (MCP, frameworks) and demonstrated ability to architect event-driven systems from scratch (GISCollective, re:cinq)
Strong teaching and mentoring background across multiple organizations, with pattern of adopting leadership roles at scale-ups
concerns: No demonstrated track record of scaling engineering teams or building organizational leadership layers; roles show technical contribution rather than team building and org structure
Minimal fintech infrastructure expertise—single brief 16-month stint at RIDE Capital with no detail on credit systems, payment flows, working-capital architecture, or compliance
Current agentic AI work lacks clear evidence of production multi-agent systems operating with real financial consequences, evaluation pipelines, or auditable agent behavior
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically accomplished full-stack engineer with genuine recent exposure to agentic AI frameworks and proven expertise in building systems at scale. However, this CTO role explicitly requires demonstrated fintech infrastructure expertise and a track record of scaling engineering organizations—neither clearly present in the resume. His agentic AI work at re:cinq is recent and tooling-focused; there is no evidence of architecting and operating production multi-agent systems with real financial consequences or the evaluation/compliance infrastructure required for fintech. His distributed-systems strength is valuable but insufficient to offset the missing leadership track record and domain-specific expertise needed for this venture-backed fintech executive role.
